facilities.title: Columbia Asia Extended Care Hospital
facilities.editorial_summary:
**What it is**
Columbia Asia Extended Care Hospital (Shah Alam) is a private MOH-licensed extended care hospital operated by the Columbia Asia hospital group, located in Section 17, Shah Alam, Selangor. Unlike typical nursing homes, it functions as a step-down hospital specifically designed for patients who have passed the acute phase of illness but still require intensive nursing and rehabilitation before returning home.

**Care services**
- 24-hour nursing care by State Registered Nurses
- Post-hospitalisation and long-term care
- Palliative care
- Respite care (short-term admissions)
- Physiotherapy, occupational therapy, and speech therapy
- Outpatient medical treatment by on-site doctors
- Dietary review by visiting dietitian
- Integrated orthopaedic recovery pathway (partnership with TAGS Chiro & Rehab)

**Staffing & support**
- State Registered Nurses on duty 24 hours
- In-house physiotherapists and occupational therapists
- Medical officers with extended care specialisation on site
- Doctor house calls available

**Capacity & pricing**
- Daily room rates: single small room with meals RM 130/day; 2-bedded room with meals RM 105/day; nursing service RM 83.49/day
- Therapy sessions RM 80–180 per session
- Package deals available: 10-day neuro recovery RM 7,500; 30-day neuro recovery RM 30,000

**License & verification**
- **JKM status:** not applicable (hospital, not a JKM-regulated care home)
- **MOH status:** licensed (private hospital, part of Columbia Asia group)

**What to ask on visit**
- What is the minimum and maximum intended length of stay?
- How are transitions back to home or to a nursing home managed?
- What insurance panels are accepted for extended care admissions?
- Is a geriatric specialist or psychiatrist available for dementia patients?
facilities.care_types: Extended Care Hospital + Rehabilitation + Palliative + Respite
facilities.pricing_display: From RM 105/day (2-bed room, meals included); nursing fee extra
facilities.confidence_note: Detailed pricing and service list confirmed directly from Columbia Asia website; MOH status confirmed as licensed private hospital.

facilities.title: AustinLoyal Care Centre
facilities.editorial_summary:
**What it is**
AustinLoyal Care Centre is a private nursing home in Taman Mount Austin, Johor Bahru, branded as an "urban care retreat." It focuses on rehabilitation-oriented nursing care for post-hospitalisation patients, particularly those recovering from cancer, stroke, and chronic conditions causing mobility difficulties.

**Care services**
- Post-hospitalisation nursing and recovery support
- Personalised physiotherapy programmes
- Blood sugar monitoring and chronic disease management
- Wound care including eczema management
- Dementia care (confirmed from reviewer accounts)
- Nutritional support and dietary planning (including supplement guidance)

**Staffing & support**
- Local nurses available 24 hours with call bells in rooms
- Wheelchair accessible entrance and parking
- Air conditioning in all rooms

**Capacity & pricing**
- Pricing not published on operator website — request a written quote during your visit

**License & verification**
- To be verified — confirm JKM and MOH registration on visit.

**What to ask on visit**
- Is the facility registered with JKM and can you see the certificate?
- What is the nurse-to-resident ratio on night shifts?
- How are families kept updated on their loved one's progress?
- What visiting hours are available?
- What is the monthly fee structure including any additional charges?
facilities.confidence_note: Care services and 24-hour nursing confirmed from multiple detailed Google Maps reviews; pricing not published; JKM status unconfirmed.

facilities.title: ECON Medicare Centre & Nursing Home - Taman Perling Branch
facilities.editorial_summary:
**What it is**
ECON Medicare Centre & Nursing Home (Taman Perling) is the Johor Bahru branch of ECON Healthcare, a well-established Malaysian healthcare operator with centres in both Johor and Selangor. Located in Taman Perling, Johor Bahru, this centre offers residential nursing care, rehabilitation, and home care services under a group brand that positions itself as a clinical, family-centred care provider.

**Care services**
- Long-term residential nursing care
- Post-surgical and post-hospitalisation rehabilitation
- Physiotherapy and acupuncture services
- Palliative care
- Home care services (separate team)
- Ambulance and patient transport

**Staffing & support**
- Professional nursing staff on site
- Physiotherapy team — reviewer tags confirm physio and acupuncture
- Wheelchair accessible entrance and parking

**Capacity & pricing**
- 199 beds (confirmed)
- Pricing from approximately RM 1,950/month — contact the centre for current rates as fees vary by care level and room type

**License & verification**
- To be verified — confirm JKM and MOH registration on visit.

**What to ask on visit**
- Is the facility registered with JKM and can you view the licence?
- What is the current room availability and monthly fee for your required care level?
- Are physiotherapy and acupuncture sessions included in the monthly fee or charged separately?
- What is the policy for medical emergencies and hospital transfers?
facilities.confidence_note: Bed count and pricing indicator from sheet; physio/acupuncture confirmed from Maps review tags; JKM status unconfirmed.

facilities.title: FCC Family Care Centre Johor Bahru
facilities.editorial_summary:
**What it is**
FCC Family Care Centre is a distinctive senior living and wellness village in Ulu Tiram, Johor Bahru, describing itself as Malaysia's first integrated senior living community. Set on a green campus with an edible garden, farm animals, and open outdoor spaces, it takes a community-lifestyle approach to elder care rather than a purely clinical model.

**Care services**
- Nursing home (long-term residential care)
- Assisted living
- Day care
- Rehabilitation and physiotherapy
- Doctor visits (confirmed)
- Community lifestyle activities including technology classes, fitness programmes, gardening
- Care farming and green environment programming

**Staffing & support**
- Language support: English, BM, Mandarin
- Doctor visit programme confirmed

**Capacity & pricing**
- Shared accommodation from RM 600/month; private room from RM 4,300/month — confirm current rates directly as the range suggests different room categories and care levels

**License & verification**
- To be verified — confirm JKM and MOH registration on visit.

**What to ask on visit**
- Is the facility registered with JKM and can you see the certificate?
- What care levels are covered under each fee tier?
- How frequent are doctor visits and what is included?
- Is there a minimum stay requirement or trial period available?
- What happens if a resident's care needs escalate beyond the centre's capability?
facilities.care_types: Nursing Home + Day Care + Assisted Living + Rehabilitation
facilities.confidence_note: Pricing from sheet; care model and community focus confirmed from website; JKM/MOH status unconfirmed; Maps score 4.9/5 from 154 reviews.

facilities.title: My Precious Home Care Elder Care
facilities.editorial_summary:
**What it is**
My Precious Home Care Elder Care is a nursing home in Subang Jaya, Selangor (Taman Subang Mewah), founded by medical professionals and positioned as a clinical yet homely residential care provider. It serves residents requiring nursing care, dementia support, palliative care, and rehabilitation, and also offers home care services as a separate offering.

**Care services**
- 24-hour residential nursing care
- Dementia care
- Palliative care
- Rehabilitation support
- Home care (separate team available)
- Four meals daily (home-cooked)
- Monitoring visits by healthcare personnel

**Staffing & support**
- Founded and guided by medical professionals
- 24-hour care services confirmed
- Wheelchair accessible entrance, parking, restroom, and seating
- Assistive hearing loop available

**Capacity & pricing**
- Pricing not published on operator website — request a written quote during your visit

**License & verification**
- To be verified — confirm JKM and MOH registration on visit.

**What to ask on visit**
- Is the facility registered with JKM and can you see the licence certificate?
- What is the monthly fee structure for dementia or palliative care residents?
- How are families notified in the event of a change in a resident's condition?
- What is the staff-to-resident ratio during night hours?
facilities.confidence_note: Care services, medical-professional founding, and 24-hour care confirmed from website; Maps score 4.7/5 from 122 reviews; JKM/MOH unconfirmed.

facilities.title: Mintygreen Nursing Home (ElderCare Center)
facilities.editorial_summary:
**What it is**
Mintygreen Nursing Home is part of the Mintygreen Wellness group, a multi-branch eldercare operator with locations across the Klang Valley including PJ, Kepong, Cheras, and Kajang. This original branch focuses on providing a comfortable residential environment for seniors, with a strong emphasis on lifestyle activities and a home-like setting.

**Care services**
- Residential nursing care
- Daily activities: exercise, gardening, mahjong, and creative pursuits
- Nutritional meals
- Personal care and hygiene assistance

**Staffing & support**
- Caring nurses on duty (branch-level staffing not specified)

**Capacity & pricing**
- Pricing not published on operator website — request a written quote during your visit

**License & verification**
- To be verified — confirm JKM and MOH registration on visit.

**What to ask on visit**
- Is this specific branch registered with JKM and can you view the licence?
- What is the nurse-to-resident ratio, especially overnight?
- Are medical services such as doctor visits arranged, and at what frequency?
- What is the monthly fee structure including any extra charges?
- How are residents with higher care needs (dementia, wound care) supported?
facilities.confidence_note: Website confirmed; no branch-specific Maps data found; care model and activities confirmed from Mintygreen group website which covers all branches.

facilities.title: Amazing Grace Caring Home
facilities.editorial_summary:
**What it is**
Amazing Grace Caring Home is a nursing home and home care provider operating in the Klang Valley, with residential care, home nursing, and medical transport services. The centre accepts residents needing 24-hour supervision, daily living support, and rehabilitation, as well as patients with chronic conditions such as stroke and dementia.

**Care services**
- 24-hour residential nursing care
- Chronic disease management (stroke, dementia, diabetes)
- Wound care, injections, and medication administration
- Post-operative monitoring and recovery support
- Ambulance and medically equipped transport
- Home nursing (caregiver services) available separately
- Short-term and long-term care options

**Staffing & support**
- Trained caregivers and nursing staff on site
- Emergency response team available

**Capacity & pricing**
- 25 beds (confirmed)
- Pricing not published on operator website — request a written quote during your visit

**License & verification**
- To be verified — confirm JKM and MOH registration on visit.

**What to ask on visit**
- Is the facility registered with JKM and can you see the licence?
- What is the monthly fee and what is included?
- How many qualified nurses are on duty during night shifts?
- What is the protocol for medical emergencies?
- Are dementia-specific care plans available?
facilities.confidence_note: Care services and bed count confirmed from website; no Maps data found; JKM/MOH status unconfirmed.

facilities.title: EHA Parkview ElderCare (Perling)
facilities.editorial_summary:
**What it is**
EHA Parkview ElderCare is the Perling branch of EHA Elder Care, a Johor-based chain with five locations across Johor Bahru and Kluang. Located in Taman Sutera, Perling, Johor Bahru, this branch provides nursing home, day care, assisted living, and rehabilitation in a purpose-converted residential setting. EHA markets itself as government-licensed and certified.

**Care services**
- Nursing home (long-term residential care)
- Day care
- Assisted living
- Physiotherapy and rehabilitation
- Doctor visits (confirmed)
- Wound care

**Staffing & support**
- Language support: English, BM, Mandarin
- Visiting doctor programme confirmed by operator
- Friendly nurses highlighted frequently in Maps reviews

**Capacity & pricing**
- Pricing from RM 3,200/month — confirm current rates and inclusions during visit

**License & verification**
- **JKM status:** unverified (operator claims government licence — confirm certificate on visit)
- **JKM verified via:** operator_claim

**What to ask on visit**
- Can you show the current JKM registration certificate?
- What is included in the monthly fee and what attracts additional charges?
- How frequently does the visiting doctor attend, and who contacts them?
- What is the caregiver-to-resident ratio overnight?
facilities.care_types: Nursing Home + Day Care + Assisted Living + Rehabilitation
facilities.confidence_note: Pricing and services from website; Maps score 4.9/5 from 85 reviews; operator claims government licence but not independently verified.

facilities.title: EHA Golfview Eldercare Mansion (Johor Jaya)
facilities.editorial_summary:
**What it is**
EHA Golfview Eldercare Mansion is the Johor Jaya branch of EHA Elder Care, positioned alongside the Daiman18 Golf Club in Taman Johor Jaya. The "mansion" branding reflects a larger, more spacious setting than typical nursing homes. Like all EHA branches, it offers nursing home, day care, assisted living, and rehabilitation under a government-licensed (operator claimed) framework.

**Care services**
- Nursing home (long-term residential care)
- Day care
- Assisted living
- Physiotherapy and rehabilitation
- Doctor visits (confirmed)
- Caregiver support for dementia and mobility-impaired residents

**Staffing & support**
- Language support: English, BM, Mandarin
- Spacious rooms noted in Maps reviews
- Responsive management (Ms. Joey named in reviews)

**Capacity & pricing**
- Pricing from RM 3,200/month — confirm current rates and inclusions during visit

**License & verification**
- **JKM status:** unverified (operator claims government licence)
- **JKM verified via:** operator_claim

**What to ask on visit**
- Can you show the JKM registration certificate for this specific branch?
- What is the difference between the Golfview and other EHA branches in terms of rooms and services?

facilities.care_types: Nursing Home + Day Care + Assisted Living + Rehabilitation
facilities.confidence_note: Pricing and services from EHA group website; Maps score 4.9/5 from 70 reviews; spacious environment confirmed in reviews; operator claims government licence.

facilities.title: Amitabha Malaysia Old Folks Home KL
facilities.editorial_summary:
**What it is**
Amitabha Malaysia Old Folks Home is the residential care arm of Amitabha Malaysia, a charitable organisation in Kuala Lumpur that also operates a dialysis centre and poverty relief programmes. The home cares for abandoned and disadvantaged elderly, receiving funding from public donations and community support rather than operating as a commercial nursing home.

**Care services**
- Residential care for elderly with limited family support
- Basic daily living assistance
- Community activities and events
- Access to in-house dialysis centre (Amitabha group facility)

**Staffing & support**
- Staff team supported by volunteers
- Community-funded model with regular donation drives

**Capacity & pricing**
- 30 beds (confirmed)
- Pricing not applicable in standard commercial sense — contact the organisation for admission enquiry and contribution expectations

**License & verification**
- To be verified — confirm JKM and MOH registration on visit.

**What to ask on visit**
- What are the admission criteria and who qualifies for placement here?
- Is the home registered with JKM?
- What daily care routine is provided for residents?
- How are medical needs handled — is there a visiting doctor or nurse?
- What is the contribution or fee arrangement for families who can afford to pay?
facilities.confidence_note: Bed count from sheet; charitable mission and community-funding model confirmed from website; no Maps data found; specific nursing services unconfirmed.

facilities.title: Rumah Seri Kenangan Johor Bahru
facilities.editorial_summary:
**What it is**
Rumah Seri Kenangan Johor Bahru is a government-run residential care home operated by JKM (Jabatan Kebajikan Masyarakat), Malaysia's Department of Social Welfare. As part of the national network of Rumah Seri Kenangan homes, it provides subsidised residential care for senior citizens who meet JKM's welfare eligibility criteria. This is not a private facility.

**Care services**
- Subsidised residential care for eligible elderly citizens
- Basic nursing and daily living support
- Meals and accommodation provided
- Social welfare activities

**Staffing & support**
- Government-employed welfare staff
- Services provided under JKM's national Seri Kenangan programme

**Capacity & pricing**
- 300 beds (confirmed — large government facility)
- Fees are subsidised for eligible residents; families with means may be asked to contribute — contact JKM directly for current fee schedule

**License & verification**
- **JKM status:** registered (government-operated JKM facility)
- **JKM verified via:** government_operator

**What to ask on visit**
- What are the JKM eligibility criteria for admission?
- How long is the waiting list currently?
- What medical services are available on-site?
- Are family visits permitted and at what times?
- What happens if a resident's medical needs exceed what the home can provide?
facilities.confidence_note: Government-operated facility confirmed; 300-bed capacity from sheet; no website or Maps data scraped; JKM registered status inherent as government facility.

facilities.title: Rumah Victory Elderly Home
facilities.editorial_summary:
**What it is**
Rumah Victory Elderly Home is the elder care division of Rumah Victory, a non-profit charitable organisation founded in 1988 by the late Philip Mok Sew Kwong. The organisation also runs a drug rehabilitation centre and a children's home in the same compound. The elderly home functions as a welfare service for seniors requiring residential care, funded through charitable donations.

**Care services**
- Residential care for elderly
- Daily living support
- Community meals and activities
- Access to shared facilities with the wider Rumah Victory charitable campus

**Staffing & support**
- Non-profit staffing with community and volunteer support

**Capacity & pricing**
- 60 beds (confirmed)
- Pricing not applicable as a commercial rate — contact the organisation regarding admission procedures and any family contribution requested

**License & verification**
- To be verified — confirm JKM and MOH registration on visit.

**What to ask on visit**
- What are the admission criteria for the elderly home?
- Is the home registered with JKM?
- What nursing or medical services are available on-site?
- What daily routine is maintained for elderly residents?
- How are medical emergencies handled?
facilities.confidence_note: Charitable mission and founding confirmed from website; bed count from sheet; nursing services and JKM status unconfirmed; no Maps data.

facilities.title: Pusat Jagaan Rumah Kebajikan Warga Emas St Mark
facilities.editorial_summary:
**What it is**
St Mark's Cozy Home (Pusat Jagaan Rumah Kebajikan Warga Emas St Mark) is a faith-based residential care home for the elderly, operating under a Christian charitable model. The home emphasises meeting both physical and spiritual needs and offers supervised 24-hour residential care in a structured environment with recreation facilities, a sick bay, and an outdoor space.

**Care services**
- 24-hour supervised residential care
- Daily living assistance
- Recreation room and outdoor space
- Pharmacy/sick bay access
- Physical and spiritual care (faith-based ethos)

**Staffing & support**
- 24-hour residential staff confirmed on website
- Structured visiting hours (9:30–10:30am and 3:00–4:00pm)

**Capacity & pricing**
- 65 beds (confirmed)
- Pricing not published on operator website — request a written quote during your visit

**License & verification**
- To be verified — confirm JKM and MOH registration on visit.

**What to ask on visit**
- Is the home registered with JKM and can you see the certificate?
- What is the monthly fee and what does it cover?
- What medical services are available — is there a visiting doctor or nurse?
- How are residents of different faiths accommodated?
- What is the admission process and are there criteria for acceptance?
facilities.confidence_note: 24-hour staffing, visiting hours, and facilities confirmed from website; bed count from sheet; JKM/MOH status unconfirmed; no Maps data.

facilities.editorial_summary:

Gentle Hill Elder Care is a premium elder care centre in Johor Bahru positioning itself as a sanctuary-style facility with an emphasis on dignity, elegance, and professional medical care. The centre offers long-term nursing care, assisted living, day care, respite care, and physiotherapy, along with premium transportation services for residents.

**Care services**
- Long-term nursing care
- Assisted living
- Respite care
- Day care
- Rehabilitation and physiotherapy
- Premium door-to-door transportation
- Community and lifestyle activities

**Staffing & support**
- Language support: English, BM

**Capacity & pricing**
- Pricing not published on operator website — request a written quote during your visit

**License & verification**
- To be verified — confirm JKM and MOH registration on visit.

**What to ask on visit**
- Is the facility registered with JKM and can you view the certificate?
- What is the monthly fee structure for different care levels?
- Are physiotherapy sessions included in the fee or charged separately?
- What is the nurse-to-resident ratio overnight?
- What transportation routes and costs apply?
facilities.care_types: Assisted Living + Long-term nursing + Rehabilitation + Day Care + Respite

facilities.title: EHA Lakeview Eldercare Mansion (Permas Branch)

EHA Lakeview Eldercare Mansion is the Permas branch of EHA Elder Care, located in Taman Bayu Puteri, Permas Jaya, Johor Bahru. As part of the EHA chain, it offers nursing home care, assisted living, day care, and rehabilitation, under a model the group describes as government-licensed and certified. The Permas location serves the eastern side of Johor Bahru, close to the Permas Jaya township.

**Care services**
- Nursing home (long-term residential care)
- Day care
- Assisted living

facilities.title: Haywood Senior Living Medini Johor Bahru
facilities.editorial_summary:

Haywood Senior Living Medini is a premium elderly care and senior living centre located in Bandar Medini Iskandar, in the Iskandar Puteri zone of Johor Bahru. Part of the Haywood Living group (which also operates in Kuala Lumpur), this centre blends nursing home services with a hotel-quality residential environment, targeting seniors who want both medical oversight and comfortable, active living.

**Care services**
- Independent living
- Assisted living
- Long-term nursing care
- Short-term rehabilitation
- Day care
- Palliative care
- Doctor visits by in-house medical team
- Traditional Chinese Medicine (TCM) practitioners on site
- Activities: games, music, movies, fitness programmes

**Staffing & support**
- In-house team of doctors, nurses, and TCM practitioners
- Nutritionally balanced meals prepared daily by culinary team
- Wheelchair accessible entrance and parking
- Language support: English, BM, Mandarin

**Capacity & pricing**
- Pricing not published on operator website — request a written quote during your visit

**License & verification**
- To be verified — confirm JKM and MOH registration on visit.

**What to ask on visit**
- Is this facility registered with JKM and can you see the certificate?
- What is the monthly fee structure for different care levels?
- Are doctor visits and TCM sessions included in the fee?
- What is the transfer protocol if a resident requires hospital admission?

Spring Valley HomeCare is a small private nursing home in Kempas Baru, Johor Bahru, operated by Spring Valley Homecare (J.B.) Sdn. Bhd. The centre serves both short and long-term residents requiring nursing care and basic rehabilitation, with a management team that includes Singapore-based contacts, suggesting some cross-border clientele.

- Rehabilitation support

Persatuan Kebajikan Dan Social Kim Loo Ting is a welfare and social association operating a small residential care home, likely in the Klang Valley region of Selangor. facilities.title: PJ Mentalink Care / PJ Old Folks
facilities.editorial_summary:
**What it is**
PJ Mentalink Care is a specialist residential care home in Petaling Jaya, Selangor, focused primarily on caring for adults with mental health conditions including depression and other psychiatric diagnoses. This distinguishes it from standard nursing homes — it accepts elderly residents but its core specialism is mental health residential care.

**Care services**
- Residential care for mentally ill and depressed residents
- Daily activities and supervised living
- Compulsory pre-admission isolation period for all new and returning residents
- Garden/green space on premises
- Meals provided

**Staffing & support**
- Supervised residential environment
- Pre-admission isolation protocol in place

**Capacity & pricing**
- 30 beds (confirmed)
- Pricing not published on operator website — contact directly

**License & verification**
- To be verified — confirm JKM and MOH registration on visit.

**What to ask on visit**
- Is the facility registered with JKM and/or MOH for mental health residential care?
- What psychiatric or psychological support is provided?
- What qualifications do on-duty staff hold in mental health care?
- What is the monthly fee and what does it include?

facilities.title: Mintygreen Care Suites - Home Care Nursing Cheras KL
facilities.editorial_summary:
**What it is**
Mintygreen Care Suites (Cheras) is the Kuala Lumpur branch of the Mintygreen Wellness group, located in Phoenix Business Park along Jalan Cheras. Reviewers describe the environment as feeling more like a hotel than a traditional nursing home — a distinction that sets this branch apart from the group's suburban locations. The Cheras branch caters primarily to KL-based families seeking nursing care with a premium ambience.

**Care services**
- Residential nursing care
- Daily activities: exercise, gardening, mahjong, creative programmes
- Personal care and hygiene assistance
- Nutritious meals
- Caregiver support

**Staffing & support**
- Caring nurses confirmed in Maps reviews
- Clean environment and activities highlighted

**Capacity & pricing**
- Pricing not published on operator website — request a written quote during your visit

**License & verification**
- To be verified — confirm JKM and MOH registration on visit.

**What to ask on visit**
- Is this Cheras branch registered with JKM?
- What is the monthly fee structure and what is included?
- What nurse-to-resident ratio is maintained, particularly at night?
- Are doctor visits arranged and at what frequency?
- How are families notified of incidents or changes in condition?

facilities.title: Woon Ho Family Care Centre
facilities.editorial_summary:
**What it is**
Woon Ho Family Care Centre is a private nursing home in Kempas Baru, Johor Bahru, operated with a family-environment ethos and emphasising affordability. The centre offers 24-hour nursing care, physiotherapy, on-call and regular doctor visits, and 4 nutritious meals daily, positioning itself as a comprehensive yet accessible care option in the Kempas area.

**Care services**
- 24-hour nursing care
- Physiotherapy and advanced rehabilitation programme
- On-call doctors and regular scheduled doctor visits (twice monthly, complimentary)
- Ambulance and escort services
- 4 nutritious meals daily
- Daily fun activities
- Dementia care (confirmed from reviewer accounts)
- Wound care and bed sore management (confirmed from Maps review tags)

**Staffing & support**
- Professional nurses on duty 24 hours
- Doctor visits twice monthly included
- Language support: BM
- Spacious outdoor lawn garden

**Capacity & pricing**
- Pricing from RM 2,000/month (shared) — confirm current rates during visit

**License & verification**
- To be verified — confirm JKM and MOH registration on visit.

**What to ask on visit**
- Is the facility registered with JKM and can you see the certificate?
- What care levels are covered under the base monthly fee?
- Are physiotherapy sessions included or charged separately?
- What is the protocol if a resident's condition requires hospital admission?

facilities.title: Rebina House Care Centre
facilities.editorial_summary:
**What it is**
Rebina House Care Centre, now operating under the Rebina Sunrise Elderly Care brand, is a family-owned nursing home in Taman Kebun Teh, Johor Bahru, established since 2003. The centre specialises in elderly care, nursing care, palliative care, and hospice care, and also offers a home care platform (Sunrise Homecare) for clients who prefer care in their own homes.

**Care services**
- Nursing home (long-term residential care)
- Palliative care
- Hospice care
- Rehabilitation support
- Home care services (Sunrise Homecare platform)
- Wound care and personal hygiene assistance

**Staffing & support**
- Family-owned and operated since 2003
- Experienced management team (owner Mr Ea and manager Mr Andrew Ea named in reviews)
- Language support: English, BM

**Capacity & pricing**
- Affordable pricing noted in Maps reviews — confirm rates directly
- Pricing not published on operator website

**License & verification**
- To be verified — confirm JKM and MOH registration on visit.

**What to ask on visit**
- Is the facility registered with JKM and can you see the certificate?
- What is the monthly fee for nursing care versus palliative care?
- How long has the current care team been with the centre?
- What visiting hours are available?
- How is the home care service different from residential care in terms of cost and coordination?
